Petition To Set Aside
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Continued To Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Trustee'S Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Petitioners' Claim Against Estate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Spector appearing for petitioners. Patrick Petzel appearing for objectors. Michelle Jacobson appearing for respondent. Settlement reached with objectors. Objection is withdrawn. Settlement related to the objection summarized by Mr. Petzel. He is to file the settlement agreement. Ms. Jacobson will submit a revised order to cover both parts of the settlement. Petition to set aside is continued to 7/10. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Continued To May-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Spector appearing for petitioner. Patrick Petzel appearing for objectors. Michelle Jacobson appearing for trustee. Objections filed by two family members that were not part of the agreement. They are working on resolution in 10 days. Matter is continued to 5/1. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
